race.description: Bet365 Same Race Multi 3YO Mdn Plate
race.comment: TATAKAI UTA (6) has found just one better at both starts to date, including an eye-catching effort over 1100m at Bendigo when first-up this time in. Probably gets back again, which is a query dropping back to the 975m, but the long Swan Hill straight will suit. HEGELY (9) has placed at five of eight starts and only needs to repeat the minor placings at the past two stars to be a major player again. CHASING ATLANTIS (7) couldn't have been expected to do any more at her two jumpouts this time in, winning both by a big space, and comes right into it from the draw. DIVINE BELLINI (8) will find this much easier than last start, after which she was spelled, and there was a lot to like about her 750m Pakenham trial win.
